title: Founder OS HQ - Deliverables
description: Consolidated deliverables database merging P12 Proposal Automator proposals, P13 Contract Analyzer contract analyses, and P14 SOW Generator statements of work.

Title.description: Project title, contract name, or SOW title

Brief File.description: P12/P14: Path to the brief file used

Source Deliverable.description: Self-relation: links a SOW to its source Proposal, or a Contract to its source SOW/Proposal

notes: P12 Proposal Automator writes Type='Proposal' with Company relation from client name lookup and optional Deal relation. P13 Contract Analyzer writes Type='Contract' with Company relation when contract parties match CRM. P14 SOW Generator writes Type='SOW' with Company + Deal relations. The Deals DB has a reverse relation to Deliverables. Idempotent: by Title + Company (case-insensitive). Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Deliverables' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.
